title: Cheaper Leather Armor
description: This data pack makes leather armor cheaper and more worthwhile to craft.
body:
# ARCHIVED! YOU MAY REQUEST AN UPDATE ON MY DISCORD BELOW

### GENERAL DESCRIPTION

This data pack simply makes leather armor cheaper to craft since currently, leather armor is almost harder to obtain than iron armor. It achieves so by making the recipe use rabbit hide instead of leather. It also allows leather to be crafted into 9 rabbit hide.

### INSTALLATION GUIDE

go to your saves folder located here on Windows:
```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```
put the zipped file in the data packs folder, and either restart your world or execute /reload

### CRAFTING RECIPE SCREENSHOTS
